findings.symptom: Decoded BTR records and BTR instances are double-cast into structural field records.
findings.root_cause: BoundaryTransitionRecord fields are not decoded through a runtime constructor or boundary codec.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce BoundaryTransitionRecord and a boundary codec that returns validated fields before domain construction.

findings.symptom: Provenance payload entries are double-cast between BTR payload shape and PatchEntry.
findings.root_cause: BoundaryTransitionProvenance and BTR wire patch-entry shapes are not separated.
findings.recommended_fix: Model domain PatchEntry and BoundaryTransitionProvenance separately from BtrWirePatchEntry.

findings.symptom: Generic snapshot clone returns arbitrary T by cast.
findings.root_cause: Immutable snapshot construction is procedural and lacks a named snapshot value or builder.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce SnapshotMaterializer or ImmutableSnapshot value semantics before removing casts.

findings.symptom: BTR imports CodecPort/defaultCodec and owns serialize/deserialize behavior in domain code.
findings.root_cause: BTR wire encoding is not owned by an adapter or codec boundary.
findings.recommended_fix: Move BTR encoding and decoding to BoundaryTransitionRecordCodecPort or adapter-owned codec implementation.

findings.symptom: Domain-side HMAC computation uses CodecPort/defaultCodec to encode signing data.
findings.root_cause: Canonical BTR signing bytes are not modeled as a boundary product.
findings.recommended_fix: Have a boundary codec produce BtrSigningBytes; HMAC code signs only bytes.

findings.symptom: PropertyIndexReader decodes shard bytes and parses raw decoded values inside domain service code.
findings.root_cause: DecodedPropertyShard is not produced at an adapter/codec boundary.
findings.recommended_fix: Move property shard decode into a boundary codec or IndexStore path that returns a named shard value.

findings.symptom: PatchEntryJSON is a Record<string, ...> instead of a real model.
findings.root_cause: BTR payload and wire patch-entry concepts are unnamed.
findings.recommended_fix: Split domain PatchEntry/BoundaryTransitionProvenance from transport-only BtrWirePatchEntry.

findings.symptom: computeHmac accepts inline primitive fields as the signing envelope.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce BtrSigningEnvelope as a named value and produce BtrSigningBytes at the boundary.

findings.symptom: Decoded property shard state is represented as nested Record bags.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce a named decoded shard model with explicit node-property entries.

findings.symptom: HMAC signs an anonymous semantic object through a codec-selected encoding path.
findings.root_cause: Canonical BTR signing bytes are not modeled as a named boundary product.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce BtrSigningBytes produced by a boundary codec/adapter; crypto signs only those bytes.

findings.symptom: Verification recomputes expected HMAC from object fields instead of named signing bytes.
findings.root_cause: Signing envelope and canonical byte production are implicit.

findings.symptom: An object with readBlob only is cast to IndexStoragePort.
findings.root_cause: Property shard blob reading is not modeled as its own capability.
findings.recommended_fix: Design PropertyShardReaderPort or equivalent and wire PropertyIndexReader to the narrow capability.

findings.symptom: A readBlob surface is cast to IndexStoragePort for property reader construction.
findings.root_cause: Materialized view load path lacks an honest property-shard reader capability.
findings.recommended_fix: Split the read-only property shard dependency from the full index storage port.

findings.symptom: Deep clone/freeze helpers promise to preserve arbitrary T through Object.create and descriptor copying.
findings.root_cause: Immutable snapshots are implemented as generic object mechanics instead of a named snapshot model.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce ImmutableSnapshot/SnapshotMaterializer and stop returning arbitrary T unless a constructor or snapshot protocol proves it.

findings.symptom: checkpointPolicy is optional and only validated when supplied.
findings.root_cause: MaterializationSnapshotPolicy default-on behavior is not modeled.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce MaterializationSnapshotPolicy with default-on behavior and explicit opt-out.

findings.symptom: Auto-checkpointing returns immediately when checkpoint policy is absent.
findings.root_cause: Snapshot creation is treated as optional configuration rather than default graph behavior.
findings.recommended_fix: Default to snapshot-on policy with retention and opt-out.

findings.symptom: seek creates a new worldline source but does not create a materialization snapshot by default.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce SeekSnapshotPolicy so seek snapshots by default according to retention thresholds.

findings.symptom: No concrete lifecycle-soup blocker was classified during PULL.
findings.root_cause: This family remains part of the atlas taxonomy for subsequent scans.
findings.recommended_fix: Add concrete findings when lifecycle objects with optional-field state machines are encountered.

findings.symptom: No concrete junk-drawer blocker was classified during PULL.
findings.root_cause: This family remains part of the atlas taxonomy for subsequent scans.
findings.recommended_fix: Add concrete findings when modules mix unrelated codec, persistence, domain, crypto, and transport concerns.
